title: Ask ChatGPT
description: Ask ChatGPT the same question in 3 different ways. Write the question, all 3 versions, and note how the answer changed. What made the best answer — being specific, giving context, or asking differently?

title: Tokenize sentence
description: Write Python to tokenize a sentence (split into words) and count how many times each word appears. Input: 'the cat sat on the mat the cat'
